About Organization

National Aluminium Company Limited is a government-owned company in India. It is one of the largest integrated aluminium companies in the country.
The company was established in 1981 and is headquartered in Bhubaneswar, Odisha.

About the Programme

The NALCO Non Executive Recruitment 2026 is a government job opportunity in India. The recruitment is for 268 Non Executive posts in various disciplines.
The objective of the programme is to select suitable candidates for the Non Executive posts in NALCO.

CareerFlora Expert Insight

The NALCO Non Executive Recruitment 2026 is a great opportunity for those who are looking for a government job in India. The recruitment process is open for online application, and the eligibility criteria are class 10th with ITI NCVT / NCVET certificate in related trade. The age limit is 18-40 years, and the selection process will be based on the performance in the written exam and interview.
The best strategy to crack this exam is to prepare well for the written exam and practice the interview questions. It is also important to read the official notification carefully and check the eligibility criteria before applying.
